name: Ashima Limited
summary: Ashima Limited manufactures and sells textile and related products in India. It offers basic denim; ring/slub denim; pigment/discharged print; polyester denim; and various yarn dyed fabrics, such as stripes, chambrays, twills, oxford, herringbones, indigo checks, pique, satin, dobbies, fusible woven interlinings, etc. The company also offers a range of shirts and jeans for men and women, as well as provides ready-to-stitch trouser and shirt fabric packs for men. It sells its products under the Frank Jefferson and ICON brands. The company also exports its products to approximately 45 countries. Ashima Limited was founded in 1982 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
